description_long: This object is a long, slender sword with a pronounced, elegant curve along its blade, reminiscent of a scimitar or sabre. The blade is single-edged and tapers to a sharp point, designed for slashing and cutting. Its hilt features a straight crossguard with slightly upturned quillons, providing hand protection and a classic silhouette. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be made of the same dark metal as the blade, with a rounded pommel at the end. The entire sword has a uniform, matte black finish, giving it a modern, understated appearance. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian and functional design.
description: A long, curved, single-edged sword with a straight crossguard and a simple, dark handle. The blade and hilt are uniformly matte black, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and pronounced curve of the blade, as well as the straight crossguard and rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the curved blade and the simple, straight crossguard.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite direction, emphasizing the blade's slim profile and the handle's symmetry.
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical handle, dark metal, rounded pommel, no visible grip texture
